resumes.Full Stack Developer: Experienced Full Stack Developer with 4 years of experience building scalable web applications. Proficient in JavaScript, React, and Node.js. Experience with REST APIs, MongoDB, and Git. Familiar with basic Linux commands.
resumes.Frontend Developer: Frontend Engineer specializing in React and Tailwind CSS. Have built responsive UIs using HTML, CSS, JavaScript. Basic knowledge of TypeScript and UI/UX testing.
resumes.Backend Developer: Backend wizard with strong skills in Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL. Created microservices using Docker. Strong background in REST APIs and system design.
resumes.Data Analyst: Data enthusiast with deep knowledge in Python, SQL, and Pandas. Experience building dashboards in Tableau and PowerBI. Familiar with basic Machine Learning concepts.
